---
title: "Robert W. Walker"
---

::: {.home-hero-overlay .mid-page-start}
::: {.home-bubble-minimal}

::: {.lead-minimal}
Associate Professor of Quantitative Methods  
Atkinson Graduate School of Management
:::

::: {.circle-grid .single-row}

::: {.circle-card}
[About](about.qmd)
:::

::: {.circle-card}
[Teaching](teaching/index.qmd)
:::


::: {.circle-card}
[Research](research.qmd)
:::

::: {.circle-card}
[Blog](posts/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.circle-card}
[Publications](publications.qmd)
:::


::: {.circle-card}
[AI Tools](AI-Tools.qmd)
:::

:::
:::
:::
